title: Supplies
doc_html:
§1277.  Supplies

The clerk of the court shall furnish the court reporters with the supplies which they may need for the transcription of their notes.

Acts 2006, No. 621, §19(A), eff. Jan. 1, 2009; Acts 2008, No. 675, §1, eff. July 1, 2008; Acts 2008, No. 873, §1, eff. July 9, 2008; Acts 2011, No. 340, §2, eff. June 29, 2011; Acts 2012, No. 474, §4(B)(2).
